title: Login Issue
description: User cannot login to the account using correct credentials.

title: Payment Failed
description: Customer payment failed during checkout process.

title: Password Reset
description: Customer requested password reset but email not received.

title: Page Loading Slow
description: Dashboard page is loading very slowly.

title: Profile Update Error
description: Customer unable to update profile information.

title: Notification Not Working
description: User not receiving notifications after updates.

title: App Crash
description: Mobile app crashes when opening settings.

title: Search Not Working
description: Search function returns no results even for valid queries.

title: Order History Missing
description: Customer cannot see previous order history.

title: UI Alignment Problem
description: Buttons overlapping on small screen devices.

title: Checkout Button Disabled
description: Checkout button remains disabled even after filling details.

title: Logout Problem
description: User cannot logout from mobile device.
